headline: Why Coinbase (COIN) Is Down 6.6% After Launching AI Tools And Tokenized Pre-IPO Futures - And What's Next
summary: Earlier in June 2026, Coinbase Global expanded beyond traditional crypto trading by launching AI-powered investment tools, tokenized equities fully backed by underlying shares, and pre-IPO perpetual futures tied to high-profile private AI firms. This push into AI advice, tokenized stocks, and synthetic exposure to private companies marks a shift toward a broader, multi-asset investing platform built on Coinbase’s crypto infrastructure. Next, we’ll examine how Coinbase’s move into AI-driven...
